title: coryanthes lafontainei
intro: Coryanthes lafontainei, also known as the Lantana, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, inflammation, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Coryanthes lafontainei include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
